title: Neon Kactus Tritan Bottle | Large Water Bottle with Straw, 1300ml | Drinking Bottles for Adults | Gym, Sports Water Bottle | BPA-Free, Leak-Proof | Live Forever
features: Look Good, Do Good - Made using only premium quality materials & available in a range of stylish pantones, our tritan water bottles with straw are designed with you in mind. With a soft-touch finish, they're easy to grip & comfortable in the hands.

No Spills - Neon Kactus 1.3L straw water bottles are designed for an active lifestyle, complete with a fully leakproof screw top lid, a carry handle & a straw. Whether it's at home or on the go, our bottles will be your favourite drinking companion.

At Home or On The Go - Neon Kactus drinks bottles for adults fit perfectly into your active lifestyle. Designed with performance in mind, our bottle will be your favourite drinking companion. Ideal for both hot & cold drinks at home or on the go.

Eco-Friendly - Our BPA free water bottle is made using only food grade & fully recyclable materials. Free from all harmful toxins, our high-quality tritan will not taint your drink. Each Neon Kactus reusable saves 750 disposables from landfill!

Plant Your Tree - In the pursuit of our mission, we have partnered with Offset Earth to fully offset our carbon footprint & support a Climate Positive Workforce. For every Neon Kactus purchased, we plant a tree to help Create a Better Tomorrow!
